cards.name: Block
cards.description: Engage a selected enemy army in this hex (no additional effect yet).

cards.name: Dawn
cards.description: Grants Courage to all Free People units for 1 turn and dispels Doors of Night.

cards.name: Stars
cards.description: Environmental event. Grants Hope to all Elves for 1 turn.

cards.name: Durin's Day
cards.description: Environmental event. Grants Hope to all Dwarves for 1 turn.

cards.name: Sun
cards.description: Environmental event. Grants Courage to all Humans and Hobbits for 1 turn, and halts all Troll units.

cards.name: TreeParty
cards.description: A Hobbiton party inspired by Bilbo's celebration. Within radius 5, grants Courage to all Humans, Hobbits, and Dwarves for 1 turn, and halts all Troll units.

cards.name: Long Shadows
cards.description: Environmental event. Grants Courage to all beasts for 1 turn.

cards.name: Fury of Ulmo
cards.description: Environmental event. Halts all navy or embarked units.

cards.name: Secrets from a Lost Tome
cards.description: Reveal hidden artifacts in radius 2 and gain +1 Mage for 1 turn.

cards.name: AriseRidersOfTheoden
cards.description: Allied cavalry units in radius 2 gain Haste (1 turn) and Courage (1 turn).

cards.name: Forochel
cards.description:
Bay of Forochel.<sprite name="leather"/><sprite name="mounts"/>
OR
<TBD>

cards.name: Under Elendil's Banner
cards.description: Allied Humans and Dunedain in radius 2 gain Hope and Courage (1 turn).

cards.name: The Power of Nenya
cards.description: Target allied PC: hide it for 2 turns and grant Courage to nearby allied units.

cards.name: Clad in Lorien
cards.description: Target allied character: Hidden (2 turns) and Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: Caravans
cards.description: Sell up to 3 available resources and gain 25% extra gold versus normal sale value.

cards.name: Woven by the Galadhrim
cards.description: Target allied character: gain Haste (1 turn) and Hidden (1 turn).

cards.name: Stand of Dol Amroth
cards.description: Target allied character: gain Fortified (1 turn).

cards.name: BagginsDontLeaveHere
cards.description: All Hobbits within a personal radius of 2-4 hexes, based on each Hobbit's Agent skill, gain Hidden (1 turn) and remove Fear.

cards.name: On the Pelennor
cards.description: Target allied army commander in your hex: that army gains Courage (2 turns), and if it contains cavalry it also gains Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: The Power of Vilya
cards.description: Allied characters in radius 1 are fully healed, and Foam on the Water is cast in radius 2-4 depending on the caster's Mage level.

cards.name: DreamsOfNumenor
cards.description: All allied units on shore/water-adjacent tiles gain Haste and Courage (1 turn).

cards.name: The Beorning Charge
cards.description: Fortify the caster for 1 turn and halt enemy units in the same or adjacent hexes.

cards.name: Ancient Edge
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (1 turn) and Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: BorderPatrolling
cards.description: Reveal the surrounding area in a radius based on the higher of Agent or Commander skill, detect nearby enemies, and halt an enemy army commander in your hex if present.

cards.name: Arrows of the Galadhrim
cards.description: Target enemy in same/adjacent hex: deal moderate damage and, if the target is on forest terrain, apply Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: Ambush from Edhellond
cards.description: Target enemy character in your hex: deal moderate damage; if the caster is Hidden, also apply Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: Attired for the Winelords
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (1 turn), and gain 2 gold.

cards.name: Rain
cards.description: Environmental event: remove Burning from all units, reduce movement in radius 2, and reduce visibility nearby.

cards.name: FirstLightOnTheThirdDay
cards.description: Environmental event: grant Courage (1 turn) and Hope (1 turn) to all Human and Dunedain units within radius 3.

cards.name: FordOfBruinen
cards.description: Environmental event: allied units on shore/water tiles in radius 2 gain Courage (1 turn), allied non-army characters there gain Hidden (1 turn), and enemy units there are Halted (1 turn).

cards.name: Swift as the Galadhrim
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain Haste (1 turn), Hidden (1 turn), and if on a forest tile also remove Fear.

cards.name: Treasures of Lasgalen
cards.description: All allied Elf characters in radius 2 gain Hope (1 turn), and one wounded allied character in your hex heals a moderate amount.

cards.name: GoingOnAnAdventure
cards.description: Provide Courage to all Hobbits and Dwarves in a radius of 2.

cards.name: The Horn Calls
cards.description: All allied Human and Dunedain units in radius 2 gain Courage (1 turn), and enemy units in your hex gain Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: Shielded
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (1 turn), and if the target has Fear remove it.

cards.name: War spoils
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (1 turn).

cards.name: Healing Healing Herbs
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: heal a moderate amount.

cards.name: Royal Attires
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain Haste (1 turn) and Hidden (2 turns).

cards.name: Bound in Hithlain
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain Hidden (1 turn), and if on a forest or mountain tile also gain Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: Mounts
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: Shadows of Ithilien
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain Hidden (1 turn), and reveal enemies in radius 1 around the caster.

cards.name: Token of the Woodland Realm
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain Hidden (1 turn).

cards.name: Provided by the Elves
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: heal a moderate amount.

cards.name: MathomHouse
cards.description: Hobbits in radius 2 gain Hope (1 turn). Gain +2 Gold.

cards.name: A gift from Bilbo
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (3 turns).

cards.name: Northmen Stand Firm
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (1 turn).

cards.name: RageOfUlmo
cards.description: All naval or embarked units on water/shore tiles take moderate damage and are Halted (1 turn).

cards.name: A Light in Dark Places
cards.description: All allied units in radius 2 gain Hope (1 turn) and lose Fear/Despair.

cards.name: Behind Noldo Shields
cards.description: All allied elves in radius 1 gain Fortified (1 turn) and lose Fear.

cards.name: Gift of the Evenstar
cards.description: Target allied character gains Hope (2 turns) and removes Fear/Despair.

cards.name: Healing Herbs
cards.description: Target allied character: heal 15 HP and remove Poisoned/Burning.

cards.name: Heir to Barahir
cards.description: Allied Humans/Dunedain in radius 1 gain Hope (1 turn); caster gains ArcaneInsight (1 turn).

cards.name: Hope Reborn
cards.description: Remove negative status effects in an area of 2 hexes from caster.

cards.name: Heart of the Mountain
cards.description: At a mountain or population center, allied Dwarf commanders in your hex and adjacent hexes gain Fortified (1) and Strengthened (1); enemy commanders there gain Fear (1).

cards.name: Hidden in Hides
cards.description: Enemy units in your hex are Halted (1 turn); caster gains Hidden (2 turns).

cards.name: Joining the Rangers
cards.description: Allied Dunedain in radius 2 gain Courage (1 turn), and the caster scouts radius 2.

cards.name: Rallied Men
cards.description: Allied Human units gain Strengthened (1 turn).

cards.name: Reclaiming Erebor
cards.description: Allied Dwarves in radius 2 gain Hope (1 turn) and Strengthened (1 turn).

cards.name: Riddle
cards.description: Cancels refuse a duel and if you are issued a duel, you automatically win it (1 turn).

cards.name: Empalisades
cards.description: If you are on an allied population center, increase its fortification by 1.

cards.name: Silmarilion
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: gain ArcaneInsight (1 turn), and your next FindArtifact here is easier.

cards.name: TheAwakeningOfTheoden
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex: permanently gain +1 Commander, remove Fear, and gain Courage (2 turns).

cards.name: TheGreyCompany
cards.description: Up to 3 Dunedain in radius 3 are affected: one gains +1 Commander, one +1 Agent, and one +1 Emmissary.

cards.name: Traps
cards.description: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Blocked (1 turn) and Poisoned (2 turns).

cards.name: TrollsHoard
cards.description: Target allied character in your hex gains Fortified (1 turn) and Strengthened (1 turn); your nation gains +1 gold and +1 mithril.

cards.name: VisionsOfTolEressea
cards.description: Target allied Elf in your hex gains ArcaneInsight (1 turn).

cards.name: Well-equiped Army
cards.description: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Fortified (1 turn).
